name: Universal 3D Printed Phone Stand Collection
description: Premium 3D-printed phone stands in multiple design styles - from minimalist geometric designs to branded character stands (Android, Apple). Optimized for FDM 3D printing with vibrant color options, featuring universal device compatibility, excellent stability, and aesthetic desk integration. Highly customizable and popular in maker communities.

visual_analysis.silhouette: Multiple design variants: (1) Curved organic bird/penguin shape with tapered top grip slot, (2) Angular geometric triangle/tent design with front slot, (3) Minimalist curved wave with rounded edges, (4) Branded logo stands (Android mascot, Apple logo cutout)
materials: Matte finish with optional gloss clear coat
key_features: Universal phone slot accommodates 4-7 inch devices
Non-slip grip points in slot (optional texture)
Weighted flat base for stability on desks
Supports both landscape and portrait orientation
Minimal support structure required for printing
Generous phone contact surface to prevent scratches
Aesthetic cable management cutouts on underside

blender_steps.description: Create main base block for stand body - serve as primary volume

params.code: import bpy; obj = bpy.context.active_object; obj.data.use_auto_smooth = True; bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

blender_steps.description: Apply smooth shading to base block

params.code: import bpy; bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT'); bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT'); bpy.ops.transform.resize(value=(0.85, 0.92, 0.95)); bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Create rounded inset for organic feel on main base
Apply subdivision surface for smooth rounded appearance
Create phone slot cavity - will be subtracted
Subtract phone slot from main stand body
Create stable base platform
Bevel base edges for refined appearance
Union base platform to main stand
Create first drainage hole on base (left side)
Create second drainage hole on base (right side)
Subtract left drainage hole
Subtract right drainage hole
Clean up mesh topology
Recalculate normals for proper shading
Apply vibrant orange material (matte-satin finish)
Create PLA plastic shader with slight subsurface scattering
Generate UV map for consistent texture projection
Optimize geometry density for 3D printing and reduce triangle count

params.code: import bpy; obj = bpy.context.active_object; verts = len(obj.data.vertices); faces = len(obj.data.polygons); print(f'Stand Geometry: {verts} verts, {faces} faces (approx {faces*2} tris')

blender_steps.description: Log final triangle count for optimization verification
Export to STL format for 3D printing (watertight, no supports needed)

notes.design_variants: This base geometry can be customized with: (1) Logo cutouts by subtracting shaped objects before final export, (2) Alternative color schemes via material swapping, (3) Textured surface via displacement map, (4) Curved organic shapes via proportional editing
notes.print_optimization: Designed with >1.5mm wall thickness throughout, minimal overhangs (max 45°), no unsupported internal cavities. Estimated print time: 45-60 minutes on standard FDM printer at 0.2mm layer height
notes.material_variants: Optimized for PLA (recommended for vibrant colors), PETG (durability), TPU (grip texture). Post-processing: light sanding (400-600 grit) before coating, optional gloss epoxy resin finish for premium appearance
notes.universal_compatibility: Phone slot width (12mm) accommodates most smartphones 4-7 inches. Slot depth (8mm) prevents tipping with modern thin cases. Angle (15° backward tilt) optimal for video viewing and typing visibility
notes.cost_reduction: Current design uses ~25-30g material. Reduced infill to 15-20% maintains strength while reducing weight and cost. Wall thickness can vary by region for advanced users

variations.name: Universal 3D Printed Phone Stand Collection — Large
variations.description: Scaled up 10% for larger market segment

variations.name: Universal 3D Printed Phone Stand Collection — Compact
